Localization.Description: Aggregation of "Cisco firewall interface check started" events with id "PT_Cisco_ASA_FWSM_PIX_syslog_105008_and_105009_Interface_checked": from 4th up to 30th within 5 minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Aggregated event. Testing of the interface {object.value} started on host {event_src.host}
